name: Bilingual Alignment Pipeline
description: Specialized pipeline for source-translation alignment with consistency checks. Handles bilingual content pairing, structure normalization, and quality validation.

steps.name: Ingest Source
steps.description: Load and stage source language (e.g., English) content.

steps.name: Ingest Translation
steps.description: Load and stage target language (e.g., Chinese) content.

steps.name: Normalize Structure
steps.description: Standardize formatting, heading levels, and structure across both languages.

steps.name: Segment Content
steps.description: Break content into alignable units (sentences, paragraphs, chapters).

steps.name: Align Sentences
steps.description: Pair source and translation at sentence/unit level using deterministic algorithms.

steps.name: Check Consistency
steps.description: Verify terminology consistency, meaning alignment, and named entity correspondence.

steps.name: Verify Coverage
steps.description: Ensure all source units have corresponding translations; flag gaps or excess.

steps.name: Export Aligned Pairs
steps.description: Produce bilingual alignment manifest and supplemental metrics.
